summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-level leaderboard system with Weekly and Global tabs. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly.
passed_tests: GET /api/football/leaderboard returns global users sorted by points desc (4 users found)
GET /api/football/leaderboard/weekly returns weekly users with week_start/week_end dates (Mar 2 - Mar 9)
Leaderboard page loads with Weekly tab active by default
Weekly tab shows proper date badge (Mar 2 - Mar 9)
Weekly tab shows empty state when no weekly points earned
Global tab switching works without page reload
Global tab shows Top 3 podium cards with proper styling
Global tab shows ranking list for rank 4+ users
Tab switching between Weekly and Global works seamlessly
No console errors during tab operations
Responsive design works on mobile viewport (390x844)
Keyboard accessibility (Tab navigation and Enter key activation)
Rapid tab switching performance test passed
Backend health check and authentication working
All leaderboard API endpoint structure validation passed
